_doc: Canonical risk codes. Only YELLOW and RED are explicit severities; GREEN is implicit when no risks apply.

GLUTEN_HIGH.title: High gluten load
GLUTEN_HIGH.description: Relevant for items centered on concentrated wheat gluten, such as seitan.

UNKNOWN_BINDERS.title: Unknown binders or additions
UNKNOWN_BINDERS.description: Prepared versions can contain milk, butter, starches, or industrial binders that are not obvious from the name alone.

SOY.title: Soy-based food
SOY.description: Relevant because the course material advises caution with soy-based foods.

FRIED.title: Fried preparation
FRIED.description: Deep-fried or pan-fried preparations are treated as a stronger explicit risk in the target model.

HEAVY_FAT_LOAD.title: Heavy fat load
HEAVY_FAT_LOAD.description: Used for items that are typically fat-dense enough to warrant an explicit high-risk marker in the target model.
